title: Set up Dark Mode with next-themes
summary: Add dark/light/system theme switching to a Next.js app using next-themes with full Tailwind CSS v4 support.
declaration: I will add dark mode support using next-themes with a ThemeProvider wrapper, a theme toggle component, and Tailwind CSS v4 dark variant. This will support light, dark, and system (OS preference) modes. If you use a different CSS framework, say so before I begin.
